text_original: The Dao that can be trodden is not the enduring and unchanging Dao.
text_normalized: The Dao that can be trodden is not the enduring and unchanging Dao.

text_original: The name that can be named is not the enduring and unchanging name.
text_normalized: The name that can be named is not the enduring and unchanging name.

text_original: (Conceived of as) having no name, it is the Originator of heaven and earth;
text_normalized: (Conceived of as) having no name, it is the Originator of heaven and earth;

text_original: (conceived of as) having a name, it is the Mother of all things.
text_normalized: (conceived of as) having a name, it is the Mother of all things.

text_original: Always without desire we must be found,
text_normalized: Always without desire we must be found,

text_original: If its deep mystery we would sound;
text_normalized: If its deep mystery we would sound;

text_original: But if desire always within us be,
text_normalized: But if desire always within us be,

text_original: Its outer fringe is all that we shall see.
text_normalized: Its outer fringe is all that we shall see.

text_original: Under these two aspects, it is really the same;
text_normalized: Under these two aspects, it is really the same;

text_original: but as development takes place, it receives the different names.
text_normalized: but as development takes place, it receives the different names.

text_original: Together we call them the Mystery.
text_normalized: Together we call them the Mystery.

text_original: Where the Mystery is the deepest is the gate of all that is subtle and wonderful.
text_normalized: Where the Mystery is the deepest is the gate of all that is subtle and wonderful.
